title: Leaf Large Curved Edge Hammered Metal Planter
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: This metal planter measures 22cm wide x 17cm high. It is made of metal with a hammered Silver finish. The inner diameter is 20cm (so any of our plants with a Pot diameter less than this will fit perfectly)
As all these planters are hand made there are minor differences from one to another and each one is slightly unique
These planters are all hand made in a rustic finish With intentional minor imperfections
The price is for the planter only, but we have included some pictures to show how this would look with a couple of our plants to give an idea of size (both plants shown are 60cm high)
We have this Same planter available in a variety of sizes and colours. Intended for indoor use
description: From the manufacturer Metal Planters At Leaf we specialise in highly realistic artificial plants, trees. and accessories Our passion translates great quality products many of which are designed in the UK. Leaf Design UK Handmade planters Our planters are perfect for both real and artificial trees and plants. Leaf Design UK Leaf is a genuine UK based company supplying realistic plants , trees and accessories from Lincolnshire. Realistic Plants & High Quality Planters Available in a range of colours and finishes. Realistic Plants and Trees From our Lincolnshire workshops and warehouse we dispatch trees and plants across the UK. How can I make my artificial plant or tree look real in my planter? Our plants are high grade and ultra-realistic but the key to making them look absolutely real is to spend some time dressing out the leaves and checking the plant from all angles if you have purchased one of our wired plants; Unpack the plant and stand it on a flat surface, removing outer packaging Starting at the bottom, carefully fold out the leaves. It can help to look at our pictures or a photograph of the real type of plant you have purchased to get an idea of how the leaves should sit To get a natural curve on the leaves carefully hold the tip in one hand and the stem in the other and run you hand along the curve to bend it gently into shape Look at the plant from all angles making sure there are no gaps and your plant is well dressed out and ready to pot Put the plant inside a larger planter. You can stand it on bricks to raise the height inside Cover the base of the pot with a layer of gravel or soil How do I know what size plant I need for my planter? All our plants are measured at their highest points from the base of the plant pot to the highest leaf. The actual height will vary depending on how you arrange it. Additional height can be added by purchasing a larger planter then standing the plant on bricks inside it before covering with gravel or similar.
